findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search_leads" is 796 chars, far longer than this server's median (126). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Search enriched B2B leads by ICP criteria. Returns scored companies with firmographics, tech stack signals, and buying signals. Each lead returned counts agains…
